description: Lean tooling-trust repair lane. Scope: 1) make pre-merge and nightly Playwright exit codes truthful, 2) remove CI lint masking, 3) align lint-staged/pre-commit with the official lint contract, 4) rebaseline only the stale targeted critical-path specs and keep resolver/domain-map consumers in sync, 5) update the small set of docs that currently misstate the contract. Non-goals: new QA frameworks, resolver protocol redesign, branch-protection work, or broad critical-path rewrite.
title: Repair targeted-e2e trust and pre-commit lint parity

description: Carry the sales catalogue inline row control pattern into purchase orders and sales orders. Sales orders need left-edge add plus qty and pre-add price/markup control. Purchase orders need left-edge add plus qty before insertion into the document.
title: Apply inline add, qty, and pricing controls to PO and SO browsers

description: Staging repro on build build-mnfyji6b after PR #549 merge. Navigate to /sales?tab=create-order&clientId=1 while authenticated as QA Super Admin. The inventory grid loads and inline qty/price/markup controls render, but the client combobox still shows the placeholder 'Customer...' instead of the hydrated client label. Live QA on 2026-04-01 also confirmed SO inline add works and PO inline qty add works, so this issue is specifically the SO route hydration state, not the broader inline-control feature. Evidence: /tmp/terp-pr549-staging-qa/.playwright-cli/page-2026-04-01T11-36-05-556Z.yml and /tmp/terp-pr549-staging-qa/.playwright-cli/page-2026-04-01T11-38-51-115Z.png
title: Fix SO clientId route hydration on sheet-native create order
